+++
title = "Rewrite only the matched text"
weight = 50
+++

<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/examples (the command output is real). Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

The `text_forbids` check forbids a trailing period on the first line; its `fix` template strips it. Only the matched text changes; the later `keep this.` line is untouched.

## Input

`.katalyst/storage/local.yaml`

```yaml
type: filesystem
root: .
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: text_forbids
        target: first-line
        pattern: '\.(\s*)$'
        fix: '$1'
```

`notes/doc.md`

```markdown
---
t: 1
---
# Title.
keep this.
```

## Command

```console
$ katalyst fix notes/doc
<project>/notes/doc.md
```

## Result

`notes/doc.md` after `katalyst fix notes/doc`:

```markdown
---
t: 1
---
# Title
keep this.
```
